div.div:
Watches(MxlFlow) on SourceReconciler
Wakes the source-side reconciler when the agent publishes a new Origin location,
closing the writer-pod-startup race that would otherwise stall the source side
in FLOW_NOT_FOUND backoff.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 550px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1183px; margin-left: 590px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(31, 41, 51); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Target fast-path
Requires both status.phase==Ready AND a live in-memory entry.
After a gateway pod restart the in-memory map is empty, so the reconciler
reopens the writer and rotates TargetInfo.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 530px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1183px; margin-left: 1170px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: left;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(31, 41, 51); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
TargetInfo rotation
If existing.infoStr != mirror.Status.TargetInfo, the source side tears
down the initiator and reopens against the new peer address.
